summary: Recording quality is unspecified, but the show shines with a killer Jack Straw and monster Sugaree before tapering off in the second set.
review: The performance is praised for an above‑average Jack Straw featuring an extended guitar break and a 17‑minute monster Sugaree that stands out as a highlight. The reviewer also notes a strong All Over Now and a good Big River, but feels the remainder of the second set falls short of the first. No details on the audio source or fidelity are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments about several songs and overall show strength, but only one review with no recording‑quality details lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not comment on sound quality or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is highlighted as strong, especially Jack Straw; the second set opens with a monster Sugaree but overall feels weaker compared to the first half.
